workflows.label: Create Image
workflows.description: Main TEST text-to-image preset now uses ERNIE-Image-Turbo. Prompt-enhancer nodes are included in the workflow file but disabled by default.

workflows.label: Edit Image
workflows.description: Qwen Image Edit workflow. Upload a source image, enter edit instructions, and generate a prompt-guided edited image.

workflows.label: Create Anime Images
workflows.description: Anime image generation workflow using anima-preview3-base. Prompt node 67, negative node 65, sampler node 66, SaveImage node 46.

workflows.label: Create Video
workflows.description: Final LTX 2.3 v1.1 text-to-video API graph. Prompt node 767, negative node 109, frame node 1175, FPS node 126, audio latent/decode preserved, output node 180.

workflows.label: Create Video with Starter Image
workflows.description: Final LTX 2.3 v1.1 image-to-video API graph. Starter image node 187, prompt node 767, negative node 109, frame node 1175, FPS node 126, audio preserved, output node 180.

workflows.label: Create Video with Custom Audio
workflows.description: LTX 2.3 image-to-video workflow with uploaded custom audio. Generate tab sends imageA and audioA, plus prompt, negative prompt, and duration.

workflows.label: Create Video with Starter Image (Legacy Gallery)
workflows.description: Final LTX 2.3 v1.1 image-to-video API graph for legacy Gallery entry points. Starter image node 187, prompt node 767, negative node 109, frame node 1175, FPS node 126, audio preserved, output node 180.

workflows.label: Production IA2V Lip Sync
workflows.description: Production card image + uploaded audio to LTX 2.3 IA2V lip-sync workflow.

workflows.label: Production Qwen 2511 Storyboard
workflows.description: Qwen Image Edit 2511 workflow for scene-by-scene storyboard image production. Prompt node 30 uses Next Scene lines and up to five optional character references.

workflows.label: Characters Intro Video LTX 2.3
workflows.description: Dedicated Characters-tab intro-video workflow. Portrait 720x1280 LTX 2.3 image-to-video with audio output for later extract-audio.

workflows.label: Upscale Video (RTX SR)
workflows.description: Upscales an uploaded video to 3840x2160 using RTXVideoSuperResolution quality ULTRA, preserving audio through VideoHelperSuite.

workflows.id: presets/Create First Image to Last Image Video
workflows.label: Create First to Last Image Video
workflows.path: presets/Create First Image to Last Image Video.json
workflows.file: presets/Create First Image to Last Image Video.json
workflows.description: Final LTX 2.3 v1.1 first-frame/last-frame API graph. First image node 187, last image node 411, prompt node 767, negative node 109, frame node 1175, FPS node 126, audio preserved, output node 180.

workflows.label: Create Prompt Relay Image Video
workflows.description: Advanced scene-controlled image-to-video mode. Uses PromptRelayEncode to route beat prompts over time while preserving the starter image.

requirements.notes: Requires ComfyUI-PromptRelay custom node installed and ComfyUI restarted.
